case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. GERARDO RAMOS GARCIA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,590.56 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERARDO RAMOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERARDO RAMOS $1,590.56 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,695.56 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, GERARDO RAMOS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-16-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-16-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT GERARDO RAMOS GARCIA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
